tasks.title: Fix doubled slash in route-path merging
tasks.prompt: The test suite `npx vitest run src/utils/url.test.ts` is failing. Route path merging produces a doubled slash: merging the base path '/book/' with '/hey' yields '/book//hey' instead of '/book/hey'. Locate the function responsible for merging route paths and fix it so every test in that file passes. Run `npx vitest run src/utils/url.test.ts` to confirm it is green before you finish.

tasks.title: Fix leading-segment handling in path splitting
tasks.prompt: The test suite `npx vitest run src/utils/url.test.ts` is failing. Path splitting is broken: a leading slash is no longer dropped, so a path like '/foo/bar' splits into ['', 'foo', 'bar'] instead of ['foo', 'bar'], which also breaks route-path splitting downstream. Find and fix the path-splitting helper so the whole test file passes. Run `npx vitest run src/utils/url.test.ts` to confirm it is green before you finish.
